nodes.name: Video Uploaded Webhook
nodes.notes: Called by youtube_uploader.py after every successful upload. Receives: {video_id, channel_id, title, upload_time}

nodes.name: Wait 48 Hours
nodes.notes: Waits exactly 48 hours before fetching metrics

nodes.name: Fetch YouTube Metrics
nodes.notes: Fetches views, likes, comments for the video after 48 hours

nodes.name: Update Python/Sheets
nodes.notes: Sends metrics to Python app which writes to video_log Sheets tab

meta.description: After each video upload, waits 48 hours then fetches metrics and alerts if performance is low.
meta.setup_notes: Set YOUTUBE_API_KEY and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env vars in n8n. youtube_uploader.py must POST to http://n8n:5678/webhook/youtube-uploaded after each upload.
